analysis.name: Around
analysis.tagline: unknown — domain is for sale (GoDaddy forsale page returned for all URLs)
analysis.value_proposition: Focus-friendly video calling with floating circular video bubbles designed to stay out of the way while working
analysis.ideal_customer: Small remote teams wanting lightweight, always-on video presence without full-screen meeting fatigue

features.name: floating circular video bubbles
features.description: Small circular video frames that float on the desktop rather than taking over a full window
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

features.name: noise cancellation
features.description: AI-powered background noise suppression during calls
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

features.name: background blur
features.description: Real-time background blur or virtual background replacement
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Share full screen or individual application windows during a call
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

features.name: reactions
features.description: Quick emoji reactions visible to other call participants
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

features.name: drawing / annotation tools
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

features.name: desktop-native app
features.description: Mac-first native desktop application rather than browser-based
features.evidence_quote: Recalled from product coverage prior to shutdown; no live source available

differentiators: Floating circular video bubbles that don't interrupt workflow (vs. full-screen meetings)
Focus-first design philosophy for deep-work-compatible video presence

pricing.notes: All source URLs (landing, pricing, changelog, integrations) returned GoDaddy 'domain for sale' access denied errors. Around.co appears to be a defunct/shut-down product — the company was acquired by Coda circa 2022-2023 and the product was subsequently discontinued. No live pricing data is available. All feature data above is low-confidence recall from training data, not extracted from live sources.
